name: Library Management System
postCreateCommand: chmod 1777 /tmp && apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3-full postgresql-client libglib2.0-0 libnss3 libnspr4 libdbus-1-3 libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libcups2 libxkbcommon0 libatspi2.0-0 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxfixes3 libxrandr2 libgbm1 libpango-1.0-0 libcairo2 libasound2 fonts-unifont && curl -fsSL https://sdk.cloud.google.com | bash -s -- --disable-prompts && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && cd backend && mvn exec:java -Dexec.mainClass=com.microsoft.playwright.CLI -Dexec.args='install chromium' -Dexec.classpathScope=test
